description_long: This object appears to be a highly abstract, low-polygon representation of a human adult pedestrian. The form is extremely angular and elongated, with sharp, exaggerated limbs and a narrow torso, giving it a stylized, almost geometric appearance. The figure's arms and legs are rendered as long, thin spikes, with little to no anatomical detail, and the head is not distinctly visible. The surface is uniformly dark and glossy, suggesting a synthetic or digital material rather than natural skin or fabric. There are no visible facial features, clothing details, or accessories, making the figure appear more like a silhouette or a minimalist sculpture. The overall impression is of a modern, artistic interpretation of a walking adult, rather than a realistic depiction.
description: A highly abstract, angular adult pedestrian figure with elongated limbs and a glossy, dark surface. The form is minimalist and geometric, lacking realistic anatomical or clothing details.
description_view_0: This view shows the lower torso and part of the legs, emphasizing the sharp, angular lines and the glossy, dark surface.
description_view_1: This view highlights the extreme length and thinness of the limbs, with the arms and legs appearing as narrow spikes against a white background.
description_view_2: This angle reveals the intersection of the torso and limbs, with the geometric, faceted surfaces and the absence of any facial or clothing features.
description_view_3: This view further accentuates the elongated limbs and the minimalist, silhouette-like quality of the figure.
attribute_clothing_type: abstract, untextured body form with no discernible clothing
